name: progressive-disclosure-guard
description: PDG progressive disclosure guardrails for AI coding agents.

scripts.check: node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/pdg-check.js pdg.skill.md README.md INSTALL.md scripts/check.mjs scripts/generate-skills.mjs scripts/health.mjs scripts/install-audit.mjs scripts/pdg-check.js
scripts.test: node scripts/check.mjs && node evidence/phase-1-static-guard/pdg-check.test.js && node evidence/phase-2-doc-generation/run-eval.js && node evidence/phase-4-doc-review-passes/run-eval.js && node scripts/install-audit.mjs
